Theme Architecture

Outpost themes are directories of .html template files. There is no PHP in themes — you write plain HTML with template tags, and Outpost compiles it.

How themes work

Why ?

  • Valid HTML — templates are valid HTML that can be opened directly in a browser. Default content is visible, making templates double as design mockups.
  • Familiar to designers — No new syntax to learn. It is just HTML with data attributes.
  • Tool-friendly — Standard HTML means full support in every code editor, linter, and browser dev tool without plugins.

Auto-Detection

Partials follow the same rule: a templates can include a partial, and a template can include a partial. Cross-engine partial includes are not supported.

Syntax Quick Reference

FeatureSyntax
Collection loop <outpost-each collection="slug"> <outpost-each collection="slug">
Single item <outpost-single collection="slug"> <outpost-single collection="slug">
Menu <outpost-menu name="main"> <outpost-menu name="main">
Folder loop <outpost-each folder="slug"> <outpost-each folder="slug">
Gallery loop <outpost-each gallery="name"> <outpost-each gallery="name">
Repeater loop <outpost-each repeat="name"> <outpost-each repeat="name">
Pagination <outpost-pagination /> <outpost-pagination />
SEO meta <outpost-meta title="Default" /> <outpost-seo />
Empty fallback <outpost-else> inside loop <outpost-each collection="slug" empty>
Not-found fallback <outpost-else> inside single <outpost-single collection="slug" else>
Text field data-outpost="title" <h2 data-outpost="title">Default</h2>
Rich text data-outpost="body" data-type="raw" <div data-outpost="body" data-type="raw"></div>
Image data-outpost="image" data-type="image" <img data-outpost="image" data-type="image">
Link <a data-outpost="url" data-type="link"> <a data-outpost="url" data-type="link">
Attribute binding N/A data-bind="datetime:date"

Compile and Cache Behavior

templates follow the same compile-and-cache pipeline as . The .html source is compiled into cached PHP at outpost/cache/templates/{hash}.php on first request. File modification time is compared on each request, and the cache is rebuilt if the source is newer. Clearing cache/templates/ forces a full recompile.

Field Auto-Registration

templates participate in the same auto-registration system as . When a templates is compiled, Outpost scans all data-outpost attributes and registers any new fields in the database. The data-type attribute determines the field type (image, raw, link, textarea, etc.).
